title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Lodha & Co - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Lodha & Co - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Lodha & Co is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Lodha & Co:
Lodha & Co is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha & Co!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
